Weekly sensor report

Window: 2026-06-30 12:20 – 2026-07-07 12:20 (UTC)

Summary

  • Peak temperature this week: 34.1°C in Loft 1 on 2026-06-30 15:10.
  • Lowest temperature this week: 14.1°C in Outside on 2026-07-03 03:10.
  • Most humid room on average: Outside (70% RH).
  • Tightest condensation-risk margin this week: 1.1°C in Outside.
  • Amp-hours consumed this week: 518.59 Ah.

AI insights

With a full week of data now on record, the standout reading is Loft 1 hitting 34.1°C on 30 June at 15:10 — a reminder that lofts run far hotter than the rest of the house on sunny afternoons, and Loft 2 wasn't far behind with the second-tightest condensation margin (4.4°C). The coldest moment was 14.1°C outside in the early hours of 3 July, a fairly typical summer overnight low. Indoor humidity stayed steady in the low-to-mid 50s% RH across most rooms all week, with Network the driest (47.5%) and Outside naturally the most humid (70%). Condensation risk stayed comfortable indoors throughout, but Outside's margin dipped to 1.1°C at its tightest — just inside the elevated-risk band — worth noting if you see surface condensation on external-facing glass. Power draw for the week totalled 518.59 Ah.
